requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 and BSB Conformity as International Baseline for Bhutan BESS Project Acceptance; High-Altitude Derating
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619与BSB合格评定作为不丹BESS项目验收的国际基准；高海拔降额
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619與BSB合格評定作為不丹BESS項目驗收的國際基準；高海拔降額

summary.en: The Bhutan Standards Bureau (BSB) is the national standards and conformity assessment body in Bhutan, responsible for developing national standards and administering product conformity certification schemes. BSB conformity certification is the primary mandatory product gateway for regulated products entering Bhutan. Whether stationary BESS cells or systems fall within the current BSB mandatory regulated product scope has not been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date — exporters must verify directly with BSB before shipment. Bhutan's standards framework is IEC-aligned. IEC 62619:2022 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules in IEC-aligned markets and is expected to be referenced in Bhutan project specifications and BEA or BPC technical requirements. IEC 62933-5-1:2024 (Safety Considerations — Hazard Identification, Risk Assessment and Risk Mitigation) represents the system-level safety standard expected in project specifications. A critical Bhutan-specific consideration is high-altitude derating: Bhutan's terrain ranges from approximately 100 m to over 7,500 m above sea level, with most development and grid infrastructure concentrated at 1,500–3,500 m. At high altitude, reduced atmospheric pressure affects battery thermal management and cooling efficiency, and reduced air density reduces the effectiveness of air-cooled battery enclosures. BESS equipment must be assessed and, where necessary, derated or specifically designed for high-altitude operation.
summary.zh: 不丹标准局（BSB）是不丹的国家标准和合格评定机构，负责制定国家标准和管理产品合格评定认证方案。BSB合格认证是受监管产品进入不丹的主要强制性产品门槛。截至本数据集日期，固定式BESS电芯或系统是否属于当前BSB强制监管产品范围尚未从官方来源得到确认——出口商在出货前须直接向BSB核实。不丹标准框架与IEC标准对齐。IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是IEC对齐市场中锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准，预计将在不丹项目规格及BEA或BPC技术要求中被引用。IEC 62933-5-1:2024（安全考量——危险识别、风险评估和风险缓解）是项目规格中预期的系统级安全标准。不丹特有的关键考量是高海拔降额：不丹地形海拔从约100米至超过7,500米不等，大多数开发项目和电网基础设施集中于海拔1,500至3,500米。在高海拔地区，大气压力降低影响电池热管理和冷却效率，空气密度降低导致风冷电池箱的冷却效果下降。BESS设备须进行高海拔运行评估，必要时进行降额处理或专门设计以适应高海拔运行。
summary.zht: 不丹標準局（BSB）是不丹的國家標準和合格評定機構，負責制定國家標準和管理產品合格評定認證方案。BSB合格認證是受監管產品進入不丹的主要強制性產品門檻。截至本數據集日期，固定式BESS電芯或系統是否屬於當前BSB強制監管產品範圍尚未從官方來源得到確認——出口商在出貨前須直接向BSB核實。不丹標準框架與IEC標準對齊。IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是IEC對齊市場中鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準，預計將在不丹項目規格及BEA或BPC技術要求中被引用。IEC 62933-5-1:2024（安全考量——危險識別、風險評估和風險緩解）是項目規格中預期的系統級安全標準。不丹特有的關鍵考量是高海拔降額：不丹地形海拔從約100米至超過7,500米不等，大多數開發項目和電網基礎設施集中於海拔1,500至3,500米。在高海拔地區，大氣壓力降低影響電池熱管理和冷卻效率，空氣密度降低導致風冷電池箱的冷卻效果下降。BESS設備須進行高海拔運行評估，必要時進行降額處理或專門設計以適應高海拔運行。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in IEC-aligned Bhutan project specifications)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)

IEC 63056 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in electrical energy storage systems (relevant where specifically referenced in BSB or project specifications)
Bhutan Standards Bureau (BSB) — national conformity assessment body; verify current regulated product list scope for stationary BESS cells and systems directly with BSB before shipment

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 38031-2020 (Electric Vehicles — Safety Requirements for Traction Battery; also referenced for stationary BESS in some contexts) and GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage). The industry-specific mandatory standard GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), effective August 1, 2025, provides the primary cell and module safety baseline for stationary BESS over 100 kWh. GB/T 34131-2023 (Technical Specifications of Battery Management System for Electrochemical Energy Storage Power Stations) covers battery management system requirements. These Chinese standards are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as equivalents in Bhutan project specifications or BSB conformity assessment. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance. Chinese standards also do not address Bhutan-specific high-altitude thermal and pressure derating requirements.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 38031-2020（电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求；在某些情况下也适用于固定式BESS）和GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）。针对行业的强制性标准GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），自2025年8月1日起生效，为100 kWh以上固定式BESS提供主要电芯和模组安全基准。GB/T 34131-2023（电化学储能电站用电池管理系统技术规范）涵盖电池管理系统要求。上述中国标准未与IEC 62619协调，不被不丹项目规格或BSB合格评定接受为等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书。中国标准亦未涵盖不丹特有的高海拔热性能和压力降额要求。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 38031-2020（電動汽車用動力蓄電池安全要求；在某些情況下也適用於固定式BESS）和GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）。針對行業的強制性標準GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），自2025年8月1日起生效，為100 kWh以上固定式BESS提供主要電芯和模組安全基準。GB/T 34131-2023（電化學儲能電站用電池管理系統技術規範）涵蓋電池管理系統要求。上述中國標準未與IEC 62619協調，不被不丹項目規格或BSB合格評定接受為等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書。中國標準亦未涵蓋不丹特有的高海拔熱性能和壓力降額要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)
GB/T 34131-2023 — 电化学储能电站用电池管理系统技术规范 (Technical Specifications of Battery Management System for Electrochemical Energy Storage Power Stations)
GB 38031-2020 — 电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求 (Electric Vehicles — Safety Requirements for Traction Battery)

gap.en: Critical gaps: (a) BSB conformity — verify directly with BSB whether stationary BESS cells and systems fall within the current mandatory regulated product scope and the applicable conformity route before shipment; (b) IEC 62619 evidence — Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in Bhutan project specifications; obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Bhutan BESS projects; confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification or BEA/BPC connection agreement before committing to a test programme; (c) high-altitude derating — Chinese standards and typical IEC 62619 testing are conducted at standard atmospheric pressure (approximately 1,013 hPa); Bhutan project sites at 1,500–3,500 m operate at significantly lower atmospheric pressure; battery thermal management, cooling performance, and electrical insulation clearances must be assessed and documented for the specific site altitude; derating calculations or high-altitude-specific type testing may be required by BEA, BPC, or the project owner.
gap.zh: 关键差距：（a）BSB合格评定——在出货前直接向BSB核实固定式BESS电芯和系统是否属于当前强制监管产品范围及适用的合格评定路径；（b）IEC 62619证据——中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被不丹项目规格接受为替代依据；从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至不丹BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；在启动测试计划前确认项目规格或BEA/BPC并网协议中引用的IEC 62619版本；（c）高海拔降额——中国标准和典型IEC 62619测试在标准大气压（约1,013 hPa）下进行；不丹项目现场位于海拔1,500至3,500米，大气压显著偏低；须针对特定项目现场海拔对电池热管理、冷却性能和电气绝缘间隙进行评估和记录；BEA、BPC或项目业主可能要求降额计算或专门的高海拔型式测试。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：（a）BSB合格評定——在出貨前直接向BSB核實固定式BESS電芯和系統是否屬於當前強制監管產品範圍及適用的合格評定路徑；（b）IEC 62619證據——中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被不丹項目規格接受為替代依據；從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至不丹BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格或BEA/BPC併網協議中引用的IEC 62619版本；（c）高海拔降額——中國標準和典型IEC 62619測試在標準大氣壓（約1,013 hPa）下進行；不丹項目現場位於海拔1,500至3,500米，大氣壓顯著偏低；須針對特定項目現場海拔對電池熱管理、冷卻性能和電氣絕緣間隙進行評估和記錄；BEA、BPC或項目業主可能要求降額計算或專門的高海拔型式測試。

mandatory_status.target: BSB conformity certification: mandatory gate for regulated products entering Bhutan — BESS product scope must be verified directly with BSB. IEC 62619 compliance: mandatory in project practice where BEA, BPC, or project-owner specifications require it; BSB mandatory regulatory obligation for BESS cells/modules has not been confirmed — verify directly with BSB
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary; GB/T 34131-2023 is voluntary

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Bhutan as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in IEC-aligned markets such as Bhutan, and is expected to be referenced in project specifications and BEA/BPC connection agreements. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Bhutan project acceptance. Two Bhutan-specific factors must additionally be addressed that are absent from Chinese standards: (1) BSB conformity scope — verify directly with BSB before shipment; (2) high-altitude derating — battery thermal and pressure performance must be assessed and documented for the specific Bhutanese project site altitude. Engage BSB, BEA, BPC, and the project owner early to confirm all product conformity, licensing, and technical requirements before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，不丹尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619是不丹等IEC对齐市场中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准，预计将在项目规格和BEA/BPC并网协议中被引用。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足不丹项目验收要求。此外，须处理中国标准未涵盖的两项不丹特有因素：（1）BSB合格评定范围——在出货前直接向BSB核实；（2）高海拔降额——须针对特定不丹项目现场海拔对电池热性能和压力性能进行评估和记录。在设备采购最终确定前，尽早与BSB、BEA、BPC及项目业主接触，确认所有产品合格评定、许可及技术要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，不丹尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619是不丹等IEC對齊市場中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準，預計將在項目規格和BEA/BPC併網協議中被引用。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足不丹項目驗收要求。此外，須處理中國標準未涵蓋的兩項不丹特有因素：（1）BSB合格評定範圍——在出貨前直接向BSB核實；（2）高海拔降額——須針對特定不丹項目現場海拔對電池熱性能和壓力性能進行評估和記錄。在設備採購最終確定前，盡早與BSB、BEA、BPC及項目業主接觸，確認所有產品合格評定、許可及技術要求。
